opportunities.title: Management Accountant Dayshift
opportunities.description:
Position: Management Accountant

Salary: PHP 95,000 - PHP 140,000

Working Hours & Conditions: Mondays-Fridays; 9:00AM to 6:00PM AEST

RESPONSIBILITIES:

  • Prepare monthly management accounts, financial reports, and variance analysis
  • Monitor labour costs, margins, contractor profitability, and client performance
  • Assist with budgeting, forecasting, and cash flow management
  • Reconcile payroll, timesheets, invoicing, and contractor costs
  • Analyse award rates, overtime, allowances, and labour utilisation trends
